1111770.name: UP UP UP UP
1111770.description:
Escape the Dungeon. Fight the Physics. Become the Slime.

Inspired by rage platformers like Getting Over It and Jump King, Up Up Up Up challenges you to ascend a treacherous vertical dungeon as a determined slime girl — one slippery bounce at a time.

But there’s a catch: you're chained to a massive, unwieldy iron ball that reacts to your every move. Swing it to gain momentum. Use it to reach higher ground. Or, watch helplessly as it drags you down after a single misstep. The physics are unforgiving — and that's the point.

Features:

  • ⚪ Tight, physics-based platforming focused on precision and momentum

  • 🔗 Unique ball-and-chain mechanic that adds a chaotic twist to movement

  • 🧱 No checkpoints — fail and fall, all the way down

  • 🐣 A deceptively cute protagonist in a brutally punishing world

  • 🔁 Designed for replayability and speedrunning

  • 📈 Climb your way up one screen at a time, each with handcrafted platforming challenges

  • 💀 This is not a game for the faint of heart — frustration is part of the journey

Think you’ve got what it takes to escape the dungeon? Prove it.
